app_summary: RedReader is an Android application that provides access to Reddit content. It allows users to browse subreddits, manage their accounts, and customize their experience through settings such as font scaling and theme selection. The application requires users to accept the Reddit user agreement before accessing content and ensures that users are aware of the terms of service.

core_workflows.description: User navigates from the initial user agreement screen to the main front page and then to the theme selection screen.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow allows users to accept the terms of service and customize their experience with the application.

core_workflows.description: User logs in via a web browser and then navigates to the main front page.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow enables users to authenticate and access the main content of the application.

core_workflows.description: User navigates from the main front page to the theme selection screen.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow allows users to customize the visual appearance of the application.

core_workflows.description: User navigates through font scaling settings for different sections of the application.
core_workflows.purpose: This workflow enables users to adjust the font scale for better readability and accessibility.

screen_contexts.context: This screen requires users to accept the Reddit user agreement before proceeding to use the application.
This screen prompts users to log in via a web browser.
This screen displays a list of subreddits and provides navigation options.
This screen allows users to choose from different visual themes for the application.
This screen allows users to adjust the font scale for different sections of the application.
This screen provides access to various settings categories such as Appearance, Behavior, Images/Video, Cache, Network, Menus, Accessibility, Backup/Restore, and About.
This screen allows users to adjust the global font scale for the application.
This screen provides detailed font scaling options for different sections of the application.
This screen confirms the font scaling settings and allows users to apply or cancel changes.
This screen finalizes the font scaling settings and allows users to exit the settings menu.
